cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 豬太太同豬先生 新畫咗一幅Peppa同George嘅畫
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 san1 waak6 zo2 jat1 fuk1 tung4 ge3 waa2
cards.english: Mrs. Pig and Mr. Pig have painted a new picture of Peppa and George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 我哋要將呢一幅咁靚嘅畫掛喺牆上面啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jiu3 zoeng1 ne1 jat1 fuk1 gam3 leng3 ge3 waa2 gwaa3 hai2 coeng4 soeng6 min6 aa3
cards.english: We need to hang this beautiful picture on the wall.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: gaau1 bei2 ngo5 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 我係呢間屋嘅手工製作專家嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 ne1 gaan1 uk1 ge3 sau2 gung1 zai3 zok3 zyun1 gaa1 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: I'm the handyman of this house.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hang2 ding6 nei5 gaau2 dak1 dim6
cards.english: Are you sure you can handle it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: gang2 hai6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi2 seoi1 jiu3 daa2 hou2 deng1 jap6 coeng4
cards.english: I just need to hammer a nail into the wall.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 gwaa3 fuk1 waak6 soeng5 heoi3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: gam2 zau6 hou2 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 我而家要去探豬爺爺同豬嫲嫲
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 jiu3 heoi3 taam3 zyu1 je4 je2 tung4 zyu1 maa4 maa4
cards.english: I'm going to visit Grandpa Pig and Grandma Pig now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: ci4 di1 gin3 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 gaau2 dou3 laap6 laap6 lyun6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 wui6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: zoi3 gin3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: zoi3 gin3 zoi3 gin3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我哋可以幫你手掛畫嗎？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 bong1 nei5 sau2 gwaa3 waak6 maa1
cards.english: Daddy, can we help you hang the painting?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 你哋可以睇，然後學下點樣正確掛畫
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 ho2 ji5 tai2 jin4 hau6 hok6 haa6 dim2 joeng2 zing3 kok3 gwaa3 waa2
cards.english: You guys can watch, then learn how to hang a painting correctly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 ngo5 jiu3 jat1 baa2 laai1 cek3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: zung6 jau5 jat1 zi1 jyun4 bat1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 呢度就係我準備打好釘嘅位置
cards.jyutping: ni1 dou6 zau6 hai6 ngo5 zeon2 bei6 daa2 hou2 ding1 ge3 wai6 zi3
cards.english: This is where I'm going to hammer in the nail.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 zing2 laan6 fuk1 coeng4 aa3 de1 dei6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 而家我要一個鎚仔，仲有口釘
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 ngo5 jiu3 jat1 go3 ceoi4 zai2 zung6 jau5 hau2 ding1
cards.english: Now I need a hammer, and some nails.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 你哋唔好行緊埋，睇下我點樣做嘢啦
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 m4 hou2 hang4 gan2 maai4 tai2 haa6 ngo5 dim2 joeng2 zou6 je5 laa1
cards.english: Don't come too close, watch how I do it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 豬先生準備將口釘打入牆度
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 zeon2 bei6 zoeng1 hau2 ding1 daa2 jap6 coeng4 dou6
cards.english: Mr. Pig is preparing to hammer the nails into the wall.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 daa2 laan6 fuk1 coeng4 aa3 de1 dei6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 so4 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 jing1 goi1 wui6 gam2 gaa4 wo3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 豬先生搞到幅牆出現咗好多裂縫
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 gaau2 dou3 fuk1 coeng4 ceot1 jin6 zo2 hou2 do1 lit6 fung4
cards.english: Mr. Pig has caused many cracks to appear in the wall.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: juk1 de1 dei6 nei5 zing2 laan6 fuk1 coeng4 laa3
cards.english: Oh, Daddy, you broke the wall!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 係啲細裂縫啫，幅畫遮得住𠸏
cards.jyutping: hai6 di1 sai3 lit6 fung4 ze1 fuk1 waa2 ze1 dak1 zyu6 ge2
cards.english: They're just small cracks, the picture can cover them up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 aa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 我仲見到啲裂縫啊，爹哋
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung6 gin3 dou2 di1 lit6 fung4 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: I can still see the cracks, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 等我拎返口釘出嚟，然後再補返佢
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 ling1 faan1 hau2 deng1 ceot1 lei4 jin4 hau6 zoi3 bou2 faan2 keoi5
cards.english: Let me take the nail back out, and then fix it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 hou2 jyut6 gaau2 jyut6 caa1 wo3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 so4 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: hau2 ding1 zau6 ceot1 lei4 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: juk1 de1 dei6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 你而家真係整爛咗幅牆喇
cards.jyutping: nei5 ji4 gaa1 zan1 hai6 zing2 laan6 zo2 fuk1 coeng4 laa3
cards.english: You've really broken the wall now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: nei5 gok3 dak1 maa1 mi4 wui6 gin3 dou2 maa1
cards.english: Do you think Mummy will see it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 soeng1 seon3 keoi5 wui6 gin3 dou2 lo1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 aa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 loeng5 go3 soeng2 zou6 me1 ne1
cards.english: What do those two want to do?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 gin3 dou2 nei5 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 豬先生要喺豬太太返屋企之前整返好幅牆
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 jiu3 hai2 zyu1 taai3 taai2 faan1 uk1 kei2 zi1 cin4 zing2 faan1 hou2 fuk1 coeng4
cards.english: Mr. Pig needs to fix the wall before Mrs. Pig gets home.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: zyun1 tau4 aa1 m4 goi1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 首先，豬先生用磚頭填返個窿
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 zyu1 sin1 saang1 jung6 zyun1 tau4 tin4 faan1 go3 lung1
cards.english: First, Mr. Pig fills the hole with bricks.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dim6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 然後，豬先生喺磚頭上邊抿上灰水
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai2 zyun1 tau4 soeng6 bin6 man5 soeng6 fui1 seoi2
cards.english: Then, Mr. Pig smears cement on the bricks.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: waa6 gam3 ji6 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: gan1 zyu6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 jau1 soeng5 cat1 jau2
cards.english: Next, Mr. Pig paints it with paint.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: san1 ge3 jat1 joeng6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: fuk1 coeng4 zing2 hou2 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 但係，睇下佢哋搞到周圍幾亂
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 tai2 haa6 keoi5 dei6 gaau2 dou3 zau1 wai4 gei2 lyun6
cards.english: But, look how messy they've made everything.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 今次弊喇，我哋要喺媽咪返嚟之前執好佢
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 bai6 laa3 ngo5 dei6 jiu3 hai2 maa1 mi4 faan2 lai2 zi1 cin4 zap1 hou2 keoi5
cards.english: Oh no, we have to clean it up before Mommy gets back.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 首先豬先生好快噉幫Peppa同George沖涼
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 zyu1 sin1 saang1 hou2 faai3 gam2 bong1 tung4 cung1 loeng4
cards.english: First, Mr. Pig quickly helps Peppa and George take a bath.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: zi1 hau6 zau6 kap1 can4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 而豬先生就收埋啲工具
cards.jyutping: ji4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 zau6 sau1 maai4 di1 gung1 geoi6
cards.english: And Mr. Pig puts away the tools.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 faan1 dou3 lai4 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 faan2 lai2 laa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 快啲啊，我哋扮到冇事發生過噉
cards.jyutping: faai3 di1 aa3 ngo5 dei6 baan6 dou3 mou5 si6 faat3 sang1 gwo3 gam2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 hou2 maa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 zou6 gwo3 di1 me1 lai4 aa3
cards.english: What have you guys been up to?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: juk1 mou5 je5 ngaak6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 係啊，我都睇得出你哋咩都冇做過
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 ngo5 dou1 tai2 dak1 ceot1 nei5 dei6 me1 dou1 mou5 zou6 gwo3
cards.english: Yeah, I can tell you guys haven't done anything at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji5 wai4 nei5 wui6 gwaa3 fuk1 waak6 tim1
cards.english: I thought you would hang up the painting.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 豬先生太興奮，結果唔記得掛起幅畫啊
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 taai3 hing1 fan5 git3 gwo2 m4 gei3 dak1 gwaa3 hei2 fuk1 waa2 aa3
cards.english: Mr. Pig was too excited and forgot to hang up the painting.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: hou2 laa1 ngo5 m4 hai6 zyun1 gaa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 不過我諗掛畫好易嘅啫
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 ngo5 nam2 gwaa3 waa2 hou2 ji6 ge3 ze1
cards.english: But I think hanging a picture is easy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dim6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lok6 jau6 zan1 hai6 hou2 ji6 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.characters: 但係當你嘗試做嗰陣，就一啲都唔易喇
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 dong1 nei5 soeng4 si3 zou6 go2 zan6 zau6 jat1 di1 dou1 m4 ji6 laa3
cards.english: But when you tried to do it, it wasn't easy at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E45 Daddy Wants to Put Up a Picture［爸爸要掛畫］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 gong2 bei2 jan4 ting1 aa3

defs: 1. obey; (adverb) 1. since…then; 2. because of (something), then…; 3. soon; (adverb) exactly;
allow something be a certain way
(after a suppositional clause) in that case; then
(after a clause of action) as soon as; immediately after
(same as 就是[jiu4 shi4]) merely; nothing else but; simply; just; precisely; exactly
as much as; as many as
(often followed by 著|着[zhe5]) taking advantage of
(bound form) to reach; to attain (as in 一蹴而就[yi1 cu4 er2 jiu4])
(pattern: 就[jiu4] ... 也[ye3] ...) even if ... still ...
(pattern: 不[bu4] ... 就[jiu4] ...) if not ... then must be ...
a measuring tape; a tape measure
please; thanks (for services rendered rather than gifts); excuse me
abbr. for Xinjiang 新疆[Xin1 jiang1]
abbr. for Singapore 新加坡[Xin1 jia1 po1]
to join; to become a member of
(bound form) to conform to (as in 入時|入时[ru4 shi2])
abbr. for 入聲|入声[ru4 sheng1]
(on product packaging, after {number n} + {classifier}) containing (n pieces) (from Japanese 入 "iri")
measure word to show the frequency of an action
also pr. [yāo] for greater clarity when spelling out numbers digit by digit
one part of a fraction, such as 'a' quarter, an eighth
a short duration (when used with a verb)
(archaic) person sent on such an errand
all the same; alright; no problem
to think; to believe (often with the implication that the belief is mistaken – unless referring to one's own current belief)
